title: ophrys cornuta var. cornutula
intro: Ophrys cornuta var. cornutula, also known as the horned orchid, is a subspecies of orchid that belongs to the Ophrys genus. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties, which have been found to aid in the treatment of various health conditions. The health benefits of Ophrys cornuta var. cornutula include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe digestive problems, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. Ophrys cornuta var. cornutula can be prepared in various herbal forms, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
